CustomField.description: 1. If GA Start Date is null, Status is Unknown 2a. If the current date is between the GA Start & End Dates, Status is Active 2b. If the current date is after the GA Start Date & the GA End Date is null, then Status is Inactive 3. Else, Status is Ineligible
CustomField.formula: IF ( ISBLANK (Gift_Aid_Start_Date__c), 'Unknown', IF ( TODAY () >= Gift_Aid_Start_Date__c && (ISBLANK (Gift_Aid_End_Date__c) || TODAY () <= Gift_Aid_End_Date__c), 'Active', 'Inactive' ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Active, Inactive or Unknown, based on the related Gift Aid Declarations
CustomField.label: Gift Aid Status
